widgets.name: Form_EditionIdentifier_A
widgets.tooltip: The edition identifier of the form including the form number and edition (the date is typically formatted YYYY/MM).

widgets.name: Producer_CustomerIdentifier_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter identifier: The customer's identification number assigned by the producer (e.g. agency or brokerage).

widgets.name: Form_CompletionDate_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter date: The date on which the form is completed.

widgets.name: Producer_FullName_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The full name of the producer/agency.

widgets.name: Policy_PolicyNumberIdentifier_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter identifier: The identifier assigned by the insurer to the policy, or submission, being referenced exactly as it appears on the policy, including prefix and suffix symbols. If required for self-insurance, the self-insured license or contract number.

widgets.name: Policy_EffectiveDate_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter date: The effective date of the policy.  The date that the terms and conditions of the policy commence.

widgets.name: Insurer_FullName_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The insurer's full legal company name(s) as found in the file copy of the policy.  Use the actual name of the company within the group to which the policy has been issued.  This is not the insurer's group name or trade name.

widgets.name: Insurer_NAICCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter code: The identification code assigned to the insurer by the NAIC.

widgets.name: NamedInsured_FullName_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The named insured(s) as it/they will appear on the policy declarations page.

widgets.name: Vehicle_ProducerIdentifier_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter number: The producer assigned vehicle number.

widgets.name: Vehicle_ModelYear_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter year: The model year of the vehicle.

widgets.name: Vehicle_ManufacturersName_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The manufacturer of the vehicle (e.g. Ford, Chevy).

widgets.name: Vehicle_ModelName_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The manufacturer's model name for the vehicle.

widgets.name: Vehicle_BodyCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter code: The body type of the vehicle.

widgets.name: Vehicle_VINIdentifier_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter identifier: The vehicle identification number (VIN) or serial number assigned by the manufacturer.

widgets.name: Vehicle_VehicleType_PrivatePassengerIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the predominant type of the vehicle is private passenger.

widgets.name: Vehicle_VehicleType_SpecialIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the predominant type of the vehicle is special (e.g. classic, antique automobile).

widgets.name: Vehicle_VehicleType_CommercialIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the predominant type of the vehicle is commercial.

widgets.name: Vehicle_SymbolCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter code: The symbol required for physical damage coverage.

widgets.name: Vehicle_ComprehensiveSymbolCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter code: The symbol required for comprehensive / other than collision coverage.

widgets.name: Vehicle_CollisionSymbolCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter code: The symbol required for collision coverage.

widgets.name: Vehicle_PhysicalAddress_LineOne_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The vehicle's physical address line one.

widgets.name: Vehicle_PhysicalAddress_CityName_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The vehicle's physical address city name.

widgets.name: Vehicle_PhysicalAddress_CountyName_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The vehicle's physical address county name.

widgets.name: Vehicle_PhysicalAddress_StateOrProvinceCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter code: The vehicle's physical address state or province code.

widgets.name: Vehicle_PhysicalAddress_PostalCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter code: The vehicle's physical address postal code.

widgets.name: Vehicle_Registration_StateOrProvinceCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter code: The state or province in which the vehicle is registered.

widgets.name: Vehicle_RatingTerritoryCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter code: The rating territory code where the vehicle is principally garaged.

widgets.name: Vehicle_GrossVehicleWeight_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter number: The actual weight of the vehicle or the combined weight of tractor and trailer in pounds.

widgets.name: Vehicle_RateClassCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter code: The rate class of the vehicle.  If two rate classes are required, this element should be used to enter the liability code.

widgets.name: Vehicle_SpecialIndustryClassCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter code: The secondary Special Industry Class code which applies to commercial vehicles as determined by industry rating manuals.

widgets.name: Vehicle_PrimaryLiabilityRatingFactor_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter rate: The primary liability rating factor contains the number which is used, along with the secondary rating factor, in determining the liability premium.  The primary rating factor which is always positive is based on the primary class.

widgets.name: Vehicle_SeatingCapacityCount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter number: The seating capacity of the vehicle.  Required for rating public passenger vehicles.

widgets.name: Vehicle_RadiusOfUse_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter number: The radius in whole numbers within which this vehicle is operated.

widgets.name: Vehicle_FarthestZoneCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter code: Identifies the location of the farthest zone from the vehicle's base of operation in which the vehicle is operated. The source of this code is the Insurance Services Office Zone code list.

widgets.name: Vehicle_CostNewAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter amount: The original cost of the vehicle.

widgets.name: Vehicle_Use_PleasureIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the primary use for the vehicle is for pleasure.

widgets.name: Vehicle_Use_FarmIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the primary use for the vehicle is for farming.

widgets.name: Vehicle_Use_CommercialIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the primary use for the vehicle is for commercial purposes.

widgets.name: Vehicle_Use_RetailIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the primary use for the vehicle is for the retail industry.

widgets.name: Vehicle_Use_ServiceIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the primary use for the vehicle is for the service industry.

widgets.name: Vehicle_Use_ForHireIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the primary use for the vehicle is for hire. 11/9/2009 - added field to 11/2009 version

widgets.name: Vehicle_Use_OtherIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the primary use for the vehicle is for other purposes. 11/9/2009 - added field to 11/2009 version

widgets.name: Vehicle_Use_OtherDescription_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The description of the other vehicle usage. 11/24/2009 - added field to 11/2009 version

widgets.name: Vehicle_Coverage_LiabilityIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the vehicle has liability coverage.

widgets.name: Vehicle_Coverage_NoFaultIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the vehicle has no-fault coverage.

widgets.name: Vehicle_Coverage_AdditionalNoFaultIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the vehicle has additional no-fault coverage.

widgets.name: Vehicle_Coverage_MedicalPaymentsIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the vehicle has medical payments coverage.

widgets.name: Vehicle_Coverage_UninsuredMotoristsIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the vehicle has uninsured motorists coverage.

widgets.name: Vehicle_Coverage_UnderinsuredMotoristsIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the vehicle has underinsured motorists coverage.

widgets.name: Vehicle_Coverage_TowingAndLabourIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the vehicle has towing and labor coverage.

widgets.name: Vehicle_Coverage_SpecifiedCauseOfLossIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the vehicle has specified cause of loss coverage.

widgets.name: Vehicle_Coverage_FireIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates fire is a specified cause of loss on this vehicle.

widgets.name: Vehicle_Coverage_FireTheftIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates fire and theft is a specified cause of loss on this vehicle.

widgets.name: Vehicle_Coverage_FireTheftWindstormIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates fire, theft and windstorm is a specified cause of loss on this vehicle.

widgets.name: Vehicle_Coverage_LimitedSpecifiedPerilsIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates limited specified perils is a specified cause of loss on this vehicle.

widgets.name: Vehicle_Coverage_ComprehensiveIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the vehicle has comprehensive or other than collision coverage.

widgets.name: Vehicle_Coverage_CollisionIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the vehicle has collision coverage.

widgets.name: Vehicle_Coverage_RentalReimbursementIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the vehicle has rental reimbursement or transportation expense coverage.

widgets.name: Vehicle_Coverage_FullGlassIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the vehicle has full glass coverage.

widgets.name: Vehicle_Coverage_OtherIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the vehicle has a type of coverage not specifically listed.

widgets.name: Vehicle_Coverage_OtherDescription_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The description of the other type of coverage on the vehicle.

widgets.name: Vehicle_Coverage_ValuationActualCashValueIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the valuation method used in determining the value of the vehicle at the time of loss is the actual cash value or market value.

widgets.name: Vehicle_Coverage_ValuationAgreedAmountIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the valuation method used in determining the value of the vehicle at the time of loss is the agreed amount.

widgets.name: Vehicle_Coverage_ValuationStatedAmountIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the valuation method used in determining the value of the vehicle at the time of loss is the stated amount.

widgets.name: Vehicle_Coverage_AgreedOrStatedAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter amount: The agreed or stated amount used in determining the value of the vehicle at the time of loss.

widgets.name: Vehicle_Coverage_ComprehensiveDeductibleIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the deductible is for comprehensive or other than collision coverage.

widgets.name: Vehicle_Coverage_SpecifiedCauseOfLossDeductibleIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip:
Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the deductible is for specified causes of loss.  The Specified Cause of Loss Codes are:

SCL        Specified Cause of Loss
F            Fire
F&T        Fire and Theft
F,T&W    Fire, Theft and Wind
LSP        Limited Specified Perils
SP         Specified Perils

widgets.name: Vehicle_Coverage_ComprehensiveOrSpecifiedCauseOfLossDeductibleAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter amount: The comprehensive or specified cause of loss deductible amount.

widgets.name: Vehicle_Collision_DeductibleAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter deductible: The collision deductible amount.

widgets.name: Vehicle_Use_UnderFifteenMilesIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the vehicle is used for commuting purposes to work or school, and is driven to work or school under 15 miles one way.

widgets.name: Vehicle_Use_FifteenMilesOrOverIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the vehicle is used for commuting purposes to work or school, and is driven to work or school 15 miles or over one way.

widgets.name: Vehicle_NetRatingFactor_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter rate: The net rating factor that applies to this vehicle. Do not include debits or credits that apply on a policy level. Provide under remarks a description of each debit or credit used in the calculation of the net rating factor.

widgets.name: Vehicle_TotalPremiumAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter amount: The total amount for the vehicle.

widgets.tooltip:
Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the deductible is for specified causes of loss.  The Specified Cause of Loss Codes are:

SCL        Specified Cause of Loss
F            Fire
F&T        Fire and Theft
F,T&W    Fire, Theft and Wind
LSP        Limited Specified Perils
SP         Specified Perils

widgets.tooltip: Enter rate: The net rating factor that applies to this vehicle. Do not include debits or credits that apply on a policy level. Provide under remarks a description of each debit or credit used in the calculation of the net rating factor.
